subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of Paradise! Thy letter hath attained unto the presence of intimate communion and the sanctuary of holiness, and the fragrances of the Beloved's love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه فردوس کتابت در محضر انس و مقر قدس حاضر و نفحات حب محبوب از
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
